title: Smoky Pretzel Bites
description: Crisp, savory bites perfect for snacking. Enjoy the combination of smoky and pretzel flavors.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a bowl, mix smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Toss pretzel pieces in bowl to coat with spice mixture.
Drizzle olive oil over pretzels and toss to coat.
Spread pretzels on prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool completely.
